pr.title: Record: 5-gram Eval Cache + LeakyReLU² + Parallel Muon val_bpb: 1.0920 (3-seed mean, std 0.0007) | ~15.9 MB | 8×H100 SXM

output.summary: LeakyReLU Parallel Muon eval adds an online backward-looking 5-gram cache with confidence-gated mixing to sharpen predictions via CPU lookups.
techniques: Sliding-window eval with confidence-gated log-sum-exp mixing
Online CPU 5-gram cache built from already-scored tokens
